div.h1: TTL Handling and Time Exceeded (ICMP Type 11)
div.h3: RFC 792 / RFC 1812: Per-hop decrement and error generation

text.tspan: 3. Send ICMP Type 11 Code 0 to Source

div.p: Note: Byte offset 8 (TTL) is the trigger for Type 11 generation. Checksum must be recalculated after TTL decrement.

g.text: Unused / Reserved (32 bits) - Must be Zero
Original IP Header + First 64 bits of Original Payload
RFC 792: Return header + 64 bits allows source to identify process/socket.
